Get Support
Get Support

Reach Out for Support

You don't have to navigate difficult times alone. Fill out the form below, and one of our professional counselors will reach out to you.

Need Immediate Help?

If you are in immediate danger or experiencing an acute crisis, please contact the national emergency line right away, or go to your nearest hospital or police station.

National Emergency Line: 112 · Ambulance: 193 · Police: 191

100% Confidential

Your information is completely safe with us. It will only be seen by our professional counseling team.

Prefer to use WhatsApp directly?

Message us on WhatsApp

A counselor will reach out within 24–48 hours of receiving your message.

UpliftGrove.

Supporting Ghanaian youth through counseling, guidance, and community programs. Empowering the next generation to thrive.

Okra Street, near The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
House Number 05, Millenium City, Kasoa, Gomoa East, Central Region, Ghana
